message:
style: rustfmt formatting and Clippy cleanup across crates

Automated formatting and lint fixes:
- Break long lines in method chains for readability
- Format multi-line allow attributes consistently
- Format conditional expressions with proper indentation
- No functional changes

Files touched:
- fastapi-core: coverage, dependency, extract, lib, loadtest,
  middleware, password, request, response, testing, versioning
- fastapi-http: multipart, server
- fastapi-output: openapi_display, facade
- fastapi: demo_api example

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
